topics.title_en: 7 Roblox Games That Crossed 1 BILLION Visits — The Hall of Fame!
topics.title_ua: 7 ігор Roblox, які перетнули 1 МІЛЬЯРД відвідувань — Зал слави!
topics.angle: Hall-of-fame style countdown of evergreen billion-visit titles — focuses on historical legacy, not the recent 47M concurrent record or MM2's 24.9B milestone already covered.
topics.kid_friendly_hook: Which legendary game made YOUR first billion-visit memory?

topics.title_en: Roblox Trading 101: Your First 5 Trades, Explained Step by Step
topics.title_ua: Трейди в Roblox 101: твої перші 5 обмінів крок за кроком
topics.angle: Pure beginner walkthrough — how to open the trade window, what 'value' means, fair-trade checklist. Different from recent scam-spotting and Roblox Plus trading posts.
topics.kid_friendly_hook: Walks a total newbie from zero to confident first trade.

topics.title_en: 5 Secret Roblox Settings That Make Your Game Way Smoother
topics.title_ua: 5 секретних налаштувань Roblox, які роблять гру набагато плавнішою
topics.angle: Under-the-hood settings tweaks (graphics modes, camera sensitivity, reduced motion, fullscreen toggle, performance stats) — NOT the Plus sub / PS5 / kid-accounts news already covered.
topics.kid_friendly_hook: Boost FPS and comfort in under 60 seconds.

topics.title_en: Roblox's Spring Creator Challenge Is LIVE — Build Stuff, Win Robux!
topics.title_ua: Весняний челендж творців Roblox стартував — будуй і вигравай Robux!
topics.angle: Fresh April creator-challenge announcement with entry rules and prize tiers — distinct from the Easter Part 2 / Grow a Garden / April-is-HUGE recaps already published.
topics.kid_friendly_hook: Even first-time builders can enter the beginner bracket.

topics.title_en: Dad's Corner: I Tried Tower of Hell and Rage-Quit Twice (Honest Review)
topics.title_ua: Татова рубрика: я спробував Tower of Hell і двічі кинув зі злості (чесний огляд)
topics.angle: FaionEnder's first honest obby attempt — dad POV review of Tower of Hell with self-deprecating humor. Different from his previous trading, voice-chat, 99 Nights movie, and Saturday-update posts.
topics.kid_friendly_hook: When your kid beats the tower in 4 minutes and you're still stuck on stage 3.

notes.distribution: 4 ender (top, guide, lifehack, news) + 1 dad (review) = 5 articles
notes.type_mix: top / guide / lifehack / news / review — all five content types represented
notes.avoids: No obby-tips, dev-tutorials, trends-memes, game-reviews, or building-guides today — all covered within last 72h. trading-tips and records-achievements revisited only with distinctly new angles (beginner walkthrough; billion-visit legacy list).
